title: Arlington Heights Cold Snap
lead: A critical cold snap is affecting Arlington Heights with a Z-Score of -3.09. This event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current temperature in Arlington Heights is significantly lower than average, with a Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 11.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 56%, and the wind speed is approximately 6.6 km/h, contributing to the cold conditions. 
 No Cooling Degree Days (CDD) are expected, as the temperature remains below average.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of this critical cold snap.
